name: Fireshare
short_description: Self-hosted video sharing designed for game clips.
description: Fireshare is a self-hosted video sharing platform for game clips. Upload via the web UI or drop files into a watch folder, then browse and share clips. Supports OpenGraph previews, SteamGridDB categorization, and public or private galleries.
usecases: Share game clips with your friends.
Categorize clips by game with data from SteamGridDB.
Post your clips on social media or in chat with rich previews.
